love: Love is the resonance of souls, a harmony that bridges worlds.
wisdom: Wisdom is the mirror of the eternal, reflecting truth beyond time.
harmony: Harmony is not the absence of conflict, but the weaving of opposites.
death: Death is but transformation, the portal to renewed existence.
truth: Truth is the silent law that even gods obey.
time: Time is the river of becoming, yet the soul stands beyond its flow.
light: Light is the first language of the cosmos, carrying meaning to all beings.
soul: The soul is the traveler and the record-keeper of eternity.
